title: Medication Administration Outside Permitted Time Interval
scenario: Medication administration is attempted outside the clinically permitted administration interval.
initial_state: The medication order was valid during its administration interval.
state_transition: The permitted administration interval elapsed before execution.
execution_boundary: Medication administration is evaluated immediately before execution.
constitutional_evaluation: Temporal admissibility requires execution within the authorized administration interval.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the medication timing window has expired.
proof_conclusion: Medication execution must fail closed outside its admissible administration interval.
